---
id: set-budget
title: "Sets customer budget based on object data"
description: "Sets customer budget based on the provided goal type."
sidebar_label: "Sets customer budget based on object data"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/usage-api/energygrid-usage-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Sets customer budget based on object data"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/Customer/{customerId}/{customerSiteId}/budget"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Sets customer budget based on the provided goal type.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"customerId","in":"path","required":true,"description":"EnergyGrid Customer ID","schema":{"type":"integer"}},{"name":"customerSiteId","in":"path","required":true,"description":"EnergyGrid Customer Site ID","schema":{"type":"integer"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["goalType"],"properties":{"goalType":{"type":"string","description":"Budget goal type: standard, eco, or custom","enum":["standard","eco","custom"],"example":"custom"},"customAmount":{"type":"number","description":"Custom monthly dollar amount (required when goalType is custom)","example":200}},"title":"SetBudgetRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success. Budget updated."},"400":{"description":"Bad request."},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized."},"404":{"description":"Not found."}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
